headline: Do Not Build a Retirement Portfolio in 2026 Without at Least One of These 3 Dividend Kings
summary: Dividend King stocks are turning into a necessity for all portfolios, even growth-focused ones. Stocks like PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT), and Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) are now a must-have, especially for retirement portfolios. Why? It is because most retirement investors have gone too deep into covered-call ETFs that track tech stocks and do not have enough ballast. ... Do Not Build a Retirement Portfolio in 2026 Without at Least One of These 3 Dividend King
